title: 20m Green Velvet Ribbon, 25mm Christmas Velvet Ribbon for Xmas Tree Bows Crafts Gift Wrapping Party Decoration
features: 【You Will Receive】1 roll of 1 inch dark green ribbon velvet, total length 21.8 yards, long enough to meet your diverse needs for wrapping gifts, bouquets bundling, making handicrafts, etc.
【Luxurious Velvet Texture】Made of premium polyester velvet, this single-sided velvet ribbon christmas is not easy to break and reusable, features a plush, soft texture and exudes elegance.

【Vintage Color】Velvet ribbon thick has an elegant green hue, which is natural, high-grade and not easy to fade, can make your gifts more attractive and also add beauty to your parties or festival events.

【Convenient Design】The wide green velvet ribbon comes in a roll, making it easy to use and store, and tangle-free. You can cut it to suit your needs, whether it's DIY, gift wrapping, or party decorations.

【Wide Application】Dark green velvet wrapping ribbon can be used for gift wrapping, bouquet bundling, bow making, holiday embellishments, and crafts, making it an excellent choice for Thanksgiving, Christmas, vintage weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, and more.
